news.title:
Urban Company shares in focus as investors sell Rs 734.4 crore stake.
DF International, ABG Capital, and Wellington offloaded shares via block deals.
news.summary:

UrbanCompany shares have rebounded to their IPO price.
March is considered a critical month for UrbanCompany.

news.title:
A Rs 53,000 crore IPO lock-in unlock impacts 85 firms by May 2026, starting Feb 18.
Urban Co. sees 66% unlock on Mar 17; GK Energy 65% unlock on Mar 24; others include Euro Pratik, Atlanta Electricals, etc.
news.summary:
A Rs 53,000 crore IPO lock-in unlock impacts 85 firms by May 2026, starting Feb 18.
Urban Co. sees 66% unlock on Mar 17; GK Energy 65% unlock on Mar 24; others include Euro Pratik, Atlanta Electricals, etc.

news.title:
Urban Company Ltd announces upcoming investor meetings under SEBI Regulation 30.
Virtual meetings with Nirmal Bang, Banyan Tree Advisors, and others scheduled for Feb 18 & 20, 2026.
news.summary:

news.title:
Urban Company faces GST demand of ₹7.3 crore for FY 2017-22.
Tax dispute involves housekeeping services rate and platform fee jurisdiction.
news.summary:
Urban Company faces GST demand of ₹7.3 crore for FY 2017-22.
Tax dispute involves housekeeping services rate and platform fee jurisdiction.

news.title:
Urban Company Ltd announced participation in analyst/investor meets on Feb 4-5, 2026.
Meetings with Anand Rathi and White Oak will be virtual; no price-sensitive info shared.
news.summary:
Urban Company Ltd announced participation in analyst/investor meets on Feb 4-5, 2026.

news.title:
Urban Company Ltd's Q3 FY26 earnings showed 36% YoY NTV growth to ₹1,081 crore and revenue up 42% to ₹383 crore, excluding KSA impact.
InstaHelp scaled rapidly with 1.61M orders and ₹28 crore NTV, reducing loss per order from ₹760 in Q2 to ₹381 in Q3. Consolidated EBITDA loss stood at ₹17 crore.
news.summary:
Urban Company Ltd's Q3 FY26 earnings showed 36% YoY NTV growth to ₹1,081 crore and revenue up 42% to ₹383 crore, excluding KSA impact.
InstaHelp scaled rapidly with 1.61M orders and ₹28 crore NTV, reducing loss per order from ₹760 in Q2 to ₹381 in Q3. Consolidated EBITDA loss stood at ₹17 crore.

news.title: UrbanCompany shares decline post Q3 results, excluding Insta Help losses.
news.summary: UrbanCompany shares decline post Q3 results, excluding Insta Help losses.

news.title:
Urban Company reports a 33% YoY rise in Q3 revenue to Rs 383 crore.
Growth driven by new users, steady revenue retention, and core category expansion.
news.summary:
Urban Company reports a 33% YoY rise in Q3 revenue to Rs 383 crore.
Growth driven by new users, steady revenue retention, and core category expansion.
